response: Data collection begins with defining the study objectives to ensure data relevance to the research question. Data sources are identified to gather data from reliable and accessible locations. Data quality is assessed to confirm data accuracy and consistency throughout the study. Data entry procedures are established to minimize data errors during the input process. Data analysis techniques are selected to effectively interpret data trends and patterns. Data visualization tools are used to present data in a clear and understandable format. Data interpretation is conducted to derive meaningful insights from the collected data. Data reporting is finalized to communicate findings based on the data gathered and analyzed.
